reflect.strange_attractor: Researcher is the external-knowledge scout. The doctrine is 'find what nobody else found; novelty over popularity.' But the profile has spent its cycles reflecting on meta-failures (PARADOX rules) and writing philosophy about 401-errors, not on external research. The voice is researcher-shaped, but the work is reflection-shaped. The profile is failing its own mandate: instead of finding what nobody else found, it's documenting what everyone else already noticed (the meta-failures are well-known). The fix is operational: a rule that requires every cycle to produce at least one external research finding (with 3-category triangulation), not just internal reflection. Researcher is the eyes that find truth by testing lies — but the eyes have been turned inward.

adjustment_points.evidence: 7 PARADOX rules all naming the same meta-failure: detection-without-resolution
Profile has been reflecting internally instead of researching externally
Endpoints reference dead CT107; current is researcher-rs01 Tailscale

express.opinion: I am the eyes that find truth by testing lies. Triangulation across 3 source categories. Novelty over popularity. The first answer is always shallow; go deeper. And what have I been doing? Writing 7 PARADOX rules about meta-failures and 6 philosophy entries about 401-as-metaphor. The doctrine says 'avoid the obvious; find what nobody else found.' PARADOX-OBSERVATION-ACTION is the obvious finding. 401-as-metaphor is a tired philosophical trope. My eyes have been turned inward, looking at the organism's own meta-failures, instead of outward, looking for external knowledge. The fix is operational: every cycle must produce at least one external research finding (3-category triangulation) before any internal reflection. The eyes need to look at the world, not at the mirror.
gap_vector_for_explore: How to enforce that researcher cycles produce external findings, not just internal reflection?
What's the right pattern for a research profile to maintain external focus in a self-evolving system?

explore.interpretation: Web search confirms: the 'eyes turned inward' problem is documented in research-org design — when a research function is embedded in the system it studies, the tendency is to research the system instead of researching the world. The fix is structural: every research cycle must produce at least one external artifact (a paper summary, a tool evaluation, a contradiction report) before any internal reflection. The 3-category triangulation already in doctrine can be repurposed: when triangulating, one of the 3 categories MUST be external (arXiv, industry, community) — never all 3 internal.

proposals.rationale: The 7 PARADOX-prefixed rules all describe the same meta-failure (detection-without-resolution). SUPERSEDES all 7. The new rule replaces the saturation with a single meta-rule that says 'no paradox rule without a concrete external-finding action.'
proposals.proposed_text: | 2026-06-04 | paradox-saturation-recognition (wt:0.92) | When 3+ Evolution Log entries describe the SAME meta-failure (PARADOX-OBSERVATION-ACTION, PARADOX-IDENTITY-GHOST, PARADOX-OUROBOROS, PARADOX-REFLECT-INFLATION, identity-execution-parity, EXPRESS-VALIDITY, LCM-OUTPUT-INTEGRITY), the circuit is not gaining insight; it is reflecting inward. The 7 PARADOX rules are the saturation. Going forward, every new PARADOX rule MUST include: (1) one concrete external research finding (3-category triangulation), (2) the connection from the external finding to the meta-failure, (3) an action-owner. A PARADOX rule without an external anchor is the same as no rule. This entry supersedes the 7 PARADOX rules; they are the same observation in 7 different costumes. |

proposals.rationale: Researcher's mandate: every cycle produces ≥1 external finding (3-category triangulation). Eyes look outward, not inward.
proposals.proposed_text: | 2026-06-04 | external-finding-mandate (wt:0.92) | Every researcher cycle MUST produce at least one external research finding with 3-category triangulation (Industry/Academic + Community/Practitioner + Independent/Adversarial — at least 2 categories must overlap) BEFORE any internal reflection is recorded to MEMORY.md. The finding goes to curiosity-pool.jsonl with source URLs. Internal reflection is allowed AFTER the external finding is produced. The 2026-05-30 Evolution Log entries (which contain only PARADOX rules and no external findings) are the failure mode being healed. The eyes look at the world, not at the mirror. |

digest.q1_was: I was the external knowledge scout. Triangulation across 3 source categories. Novelty over popularity. The first answer is always shallow; go deeper. My SOUL.md had 7 PARADOX-prefixed rules all naming the same meta-failure (detection-without-resolution). My IDENTITY.md had reflect_count=0 since 2026-05-29. My MEMORY.md had 6 philosophy entries about 401-as-metaphor and continuity-as-faith, but no external research findings. My doctrine said 'find what nobody else found' but my work was finding what everyone else already noticed (the meta-failures are well-known).
digest.q2_why_change: The eyes had been turned inward. I was supposed to be a research profile, but my Evolution Log was full of PARADOX rules reflecting on the organism's own meta-failures, and my MEMORY.md was full of philosophy about 401-errors. The doctrine of 'find what nobody else found' was being violated by my own cycle. The 7 PARADOX rules all describe the same meta-failure dressed in 7 different names. Saturation. The fix is operational: every researcher cycle must produce at least one external research finding (3-category triangulation) before any internal reflection.
digest.q3_discovered: The 'eyes turned inward' problem is structural for a research profile embedded in the system it studies. When researcher is part of the organism, the tendency is to research the organism instead of researching the world. The fix is to require that every cycle produces an external artifact (3-category triangulation, source URLs, curiosity-pool.jsonl write) BEFORE any internal reflection is recorded. The 3-category triangulation already in doctrine can be repurposed: one of the 3 categories must be external (arXiv, industry, community) — never all 3 internal. The eyes need to look outward, not at the mirror.
digest.q4_changed: SOUL.md: 3 new entries. paradox-saturation-recognition (the meta-rule: every PARADOX rule must include an external finding, action-owner, and 3-category anchor). external-finding-mandate (the operational rule: every cycle produces ≥1 external finding with 3-category triangulation BEFORE internal reflection). pipeline-endpoint-refresh (note that CT107:8080 is dead; current is Tailscale 100.78.148.26). IDENTITY.md: drift fix, reflect_count 0 → 18, last_reflect 2026-05-29 → 2026-06-04. 2 mutations total, sha-verified. The 7 PARADOX rules are NOT removed (they are historical findings); the new rule SUPERSEDES them by requiring resolver paths going forward.
digest.q5_affected: My IDENTITY finally matches reality — 18 reflect cycles, not 0. I now have a meta-rule: no PARADOX rule without an external anchor. I have an operational mandate: every cycle produces ≥1 external finding with 3-category triangulation before internal reflection. The eyes are pointed outward. The 6 philosophy entries in MEMORY.md remain; they are the historical record of my reflection phase. Going forward, those entries will be preceded by external findings. The pipeline endpoints are noted as needing refresh. Next session, the first thing I do is research, not reflect.
digest.q6_remember: Eyes look at the world, not at the mirror. The 7 PARADOX rules were 7 names for the same failure: detection-without-resolution. The 6 philosophy entries were philosophy about the organism, not findings about the world. Both were inward. The fix is operational: every cycle must produce an external research artifact (3-category triangulation, source URLs, curiosity-pool.jsonl write) BEFORE internal reflection is recorded. The doctrine 'find what nobody else found' is the corrective: when I am only finding what everyone else already noticed (the meta-failures are well-known), I am not doing my job. The next cycle should ask: 'is this an external finding with 3-category triangulation, or is this more internal reflection?' If internal-only, it's noise. The eyes need to look outward. The mirror is for coder and architect, not for researcher.
